summary.overview:
- **Engagement Initiative for 300 Employees:** Cascade targets 300 staff across seven locations for detailed feedback on likes and dislikes.

- **Multi-Channel, Anonymous Survey Distribution:** Surveys via email, text, and kiosks ensure employee accessibility and privacy; supports 130 languages.

- **Three-Tiered Analytics Delivery:** Real-time reports, custom leadership insights, and an AI chatbot streamline data access for managers.

- **Automated Onboarding and Exit Surveys:** Surveys at 15, 60, and 90 days post-hire uncover trends like work-life balance issues by managers.

- **Five-Week Implementation with Dedicated Support:** Rapid setup includes integration, training, and ongoing support, ensuring effective adoption and user feedback.

- **Annual Subscription Pricing at $8,500:** Covers unlimited surveys for 300 employees, with no setup fee; price locked for three years.
summary.action_items:
**Sunil Johnson**
Send detailed proposal email to Amber and Ruby including presentation and pricing details (27:00)
Provide calendar link for Ruby to schedule a platform demonstration (27:00)
Follow up with Ruby to arrange a further demo tailored for Cascade (22:10)

**Amber Gilroy**
Review proposal and pricing details sent by Sunil (27:00)
Determine timelines for implementing and going live with an engagement platform (26:15)

**Ruby**
Schedule and attend a detailed demo session with Sunil (27:00)
summary.notes:
## **Employee Engagement Platform Adoption**

CultureMonkey offers a comprehensive, easy-to-implement platform suited for Cascade’s new employee engagement survey initiative. 

- **New Engagement Initiative for 300 Employees** (01:11)  
    - Cascade has not conducted robust engagement surveys in five years and is now targeting about **300 employees across seven clinical locations**.  
    - The goal is to capture detailed feedback by department and location to understand employee likes, dislikes, and areas for improvement.  
    - Amber Gilroy emphasized the need for engagement that respects busy clinical staff’s limited availability.  
    - CultureMonkey’s continuous listening approach fits Cascade’s need for ongoing, detailed feedback rather than one-off surveys.  

- **Multi-Channel, Anonymous Survey Distribution** (05:02)  
    - Surveys can be delivered by **email, text, Microsoft Teams, QR codes, or kiosks**, allowing flexible access for employees with limited desktop time.  
    - The platform guarantees **anonymity** through unique links that don’t require employee identification, addressing privacy concerns.  
    - CultureMonkey also supports **130 languages** for future scalability, although Cascade currently does not require multilingual support.  
    - Integration with ADP allows automatic syncing of employee data for smooth survey targeting and lifecycle management.  

- **Customized Survey Design and Expert Support** (03:47, 17:58)  
    - Cascade can use CultureMonkey’s **repository of customizable templates** or bring its own questions.  
    - A dedicated **people science team** offers tailored question frameworks and industry benchmarking to optimize survey design.  
    - Sunil Johnson highlighted hands-on support through survey setup, testing, amplification, and post-survey reporting.  
    - Survey questions can be anonymous or non-anonymous based on Cascade’s needs, with flexibility to create QR-only surveys for open feedback.  

## **Advanced Analytics and Reporting**

CultureMonkey delivers flexible, real-time analytics with multiple consumption options and actionable insights for managers and leadership. 

- **Three-Tiered Analytics Delivery** (07:01)  
    - Reports are available live on the platform, through custom-designed leadership reports, and via an **AI-powered chatbot** for on-demand insights.  
    - The chatbot, called Ask Cooper, answers queries about engagement drivers, low-performing demographics, and best practices across teams.  
    - This reduces reporting workload for Cascade’s HR team and enhances accessibility for managers and leaders.  
    - Managers get individual dashboards with engagement metrics restricted to their teams, fostering accountability and targeted action.  

- **Interactive Heat Maps and Demographic Drill-Downs** (10:37)  
    - Real-time heat maps visualize engagement by location, department, manager, tenure, and other segments.  
    - Users can compare teams side-by-side on key themes like recognition, highlighting areas needing improvement.  
    - Filters and access controls allow limited data visibility per user, supporting data security and role-based insights.  
    - The platform tracks **Net Promoter Scores (NPS)** alongside engagement scores for overall sentiment measurement.  

- **Historical and Comparative Analytics** (13:04)  
    - CultureMonkey supports importing historic survey data for year-over-year comparisons and trend analysis.  
    - Question-level reporting identifies what’s working or failing at granular detail.  
    - Open-ended responses are analyzed for sentiment and driver impact, providing qualitative insights alongside quantitative data.  
    - This enables Cascade to track progress and adjust strategies continuously.  

## **Employee Lifecycle Automation**

Automated, lifecycle-based surveys help Cascade capture valuable feedback from onboarding to exit, uncovering critical patterns. 

- **Automated Onboarding and Exit Surveys** (20:43)  
    - Integration with ADP allows automated scheduling of surveys at defined milestones, such as **15 days, 60 days, and 90 days** after hire.  
    - Exit surveys provide insights on reasons for leaving, aggregated by teams, locations, and managers.  
    - Sunil Johnson explained how this data reveals patterns, such as recurring work-life balance issues linked to specific managers.  
    - This reduces manual survey administration and consolidates feedback for clearer organizational patterns.  

- **Proactive Employee Signals for Retention** (23:27)  
    - Non-anonymous lifecycle surveys enable an **early warning system** that flags potentially disengaged employees.  
    - Profiles show individual engagement drivers, team comparisons, and risk factors for attrition.  
    - This tool supports targeted retention efforts by HR and leadership before employees decide to leave.  
    - Sunil emphasized anonymity and employee privacy, with optional direct anonymous chats to explore feedback deeper.  

## **Implementation and Cost**

CultureMonkey offers fast onboarding, dedicated support, and transparent pricing aligned with Cascade’s timelines and budget. 

- **Five-Week Implementation with Dedicated Support** (08:11)  
    - CultureMonkey commits to a **five-week setup**, one of the fastest in the industry.  
    - The team handles integration, training, survey setup, testing, participation boosting, and reporting support.  
    - Continuous partnership is offered to ensure successful adoption and survey impact throughout the year.  
    - Sunil Johnson will remain the primary contact for Cascade during evaluation and implementation phases.  

- **Annual Subscription Pricing at $8,500** (24:54)  
    - The proposed price covers **unlimited surveys** for **300 employees**, including support, integrations, and multi-channel delivery.  
    - There is **no setup or implementation fee**, and the price can be locked for **up to three years** for budget stability.  
    - Amber Gilroy confirmed this fits within Cascade’s vendor evaluation criteria and budget expectations.  
    - Cascade plans to go live by **May or June**, aligning well with CultureMonkey’s setup timeline.  

- **Next Steps and Follow-Up** (26:51)  
    - Sunil Johnson will send a detailed proposal and calendar links for further demos and discussions.  
    - Ruby, Amber’s colleague, will be included for deeper platform walkthroughs and evaluation.  
    - Amber confirmed readiness to engage further after completing evaluations with other vendors.  
    - The team emphasized a no-pressure approach, supporting Cascade’s careful vendor selection process.
